{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Silver artifact
| introduced = tg-03-city-of-light
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|A [[Silver artifact]] combined with [[Red Light]] can enhance the mind.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27">''City of Light'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate artifacts]]
